eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 1:28 PM on JUN 25, 2026 Effective until 9:28 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A safe Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Peoria Police Department is looking for 12-year-old Elijah Viera. Elijah is a Hispanic male 5 feet tall, 130 pounds, with black hair and brown eyes. Elijah was last seen wearing unknown clothing description, possibly white tennis shoes. Elijah was last seen on 06/24/2026 at 2:30 P.M. on foot near North 103rd Avenue and Northern Avenue in Peoria. Elijah suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused. Please call 911 with information.

If you have contact with this SAFE Aler, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
